title: Close adopter CODEOWNERS and SECURITY configuration ambiguity

sources.reason: Define exact adopter-owned CODEOWNERS and SECURITY replacement steps.
Verify placeholder and completed adopter configuration behavior.
Link the configuration closure into the adoption lifecycle.
Surface the configuration check before production readiness.
Make the adopter configuration boundary visible from the primary entry point.

riskAssessment.reason: Documentation and readiness-test changes preserve generic template placeholders while clarifying adopter obligations.

executionDecision.reason: The generic placeholder boundary and adopted-project readiness behavior are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Replace with task-specific review focus, or clear when no special review focus remains.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The primary README and adoption lifecycle link to an exact adopter configuration checklist.
The checklist identifies the required CODEOWNERS owner replacement and SECURITY.md reporting-policy replacement without supplying repository-specific values.
Readiness tests prove adopted repositories fail closed with placeholders and pass only after explicit configuration.
The full documentation, quality, AI governance, and PR ownership gates pass.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The review correctly notes that CODEOWNERS and SECURITY.md remain adopter-owned placeholders, but the configuration handoff should be impossible to miss.
constraints: Do not invent an owner team, security contact, SLA, or platform identity.
Keep readiness fail-closed for adopted repositories until placeholders are replaced.
intent.rationale: A dedicated adopter checklist and focused tests close the documentation and verification gap without pretending the generic template knows adopter-specific security facts.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
